detail: agent ready; model Opus 4.8, context loaded (decoding-decoding project, counter-decoding exps A/B/C, claim audit pending)
text:
Ready — model is set to Opus 4.8. What would you like to work on?

For context, I can see this is the `decoding-decoding` project. Recent work includes the counter-decoding sweep (Exp A/B/C done) and a paper that has an open claim audit (`paper/claim_audit.md` flags 5/7 sections as overclaiming, primer-first). Happy to pick any of that up, or whatever else you have in mind.
